name: Microwave Theory & Technology Society
description: Explores high-frequency technology including radar systems and competes at the International Microwave Symposium.
longDescription: The Microwave Theory and Techniques Society (MTT-S) explores high-frequency technology and RF engineering. Projects include a radar system for Spin Scooters to prevent collisions and competing at the International Microwave Symposium (IMS). Members work with microwave circuits, antenna design, and signal processing.

projects.name: Spin Scooter Radar
projects.description: A radar collision-avoidance system for Spin Scooters, using microwave sensing to detect obstacles and prevent accidents.

projects.name: IMS Competition Entry
projects.description: The team's entry for the International Microwave Symposium, showcasing cutting-edge microwave circuit design.
